# Pull Request Template

## Description

Please describe the changes in this PR.  
(Example: “Added new ADC shim for XYZ transducer”, “Fixed 1000 Hz sensor path timing”, “New response curve #7 with formula”, etc.)

## Related Issue(s)

Closes #xxx (replace with issue number or delete this line)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New ADC/hardware shim
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the existing style and architecture (FreeRTOS tasks, devices/ abstraction, LovyanGFX, etc.)
- [ ] I have tested the change on real hardware at 1000 Hz
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation (README.md, devices/README.md, hardware/ diagrams, CHANGELOG.md)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where applicable (or explained why not)
- [ ] All new ADC shims follow the formal contract in devices/README.md
- [ ] The PR title follows the conventional format: `[TYPE] Short description`

## Additional Context / Testing Notes

(Include any special hardware used, calibration values, sensor raw data, or screenshots of the OLED menus after the change.  
This helps the reviewer merge faster.)

## Screenshots / Videos (if applicable)

(Drag-and-drop OLED screenshots, wiring photos, or short test videos here.)

---

**Thank you for contributing to BalduHandbrake.**  
Your work helps make this the reference open-source hydraulic handbrake platform.
